rows.label: tev071601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev071601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Sen'luarb about Goetia.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev071601_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Sen'luarb about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Sen'luarb about life in NLA.

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0001
rows.name:
My Ovah trembles at the
mere mention of her name.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0002
rows.name:
It seems that Kun'luarb must
have been savagely tortured by
her when he served the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0003
rows.name:
And companions of his that were
brought with him to Mira were
killed by her for sport.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0004
rows.name:
But you have brought her
reign of terror to an end?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0005
rows.name:
Then for Kun'luarb, who now
resides within me, allow me to
express our deepest gratitude.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0008
rows.name:
Through my Ovah, I have inherited
all the intentions of Kun'luarb.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0009
rows.name:
It now falls upon Sin'luarb and
myself to complete his life's work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0010
rows.name:
That means overseeing the binary
fission of Orphe in this land until
we are uncountable in number.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0011
rows.name:
This will not be an easy task, but with your assistance,
the odds of success are not insignificant. I hope that
you will continue to protect our frail people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0016
rows.name:
I am helping Kon'luarb
mass-produce senirapa water.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0017
rows.name:
We owe much to the vast quantities
of water purified by the Biahno
water-purification plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0018
rows.name:
Without it, producing more senirapa
water would simply not be possible.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0019
rows.name:
I understand that "Ajoa" is the name
of the human who created the plant?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0020
rows.name:
What has become of her? She is a
hero to the Orphe, and I would like
to express my gratitude to her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Sen'luarb about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0012
rows.name:
Because of the senirapa water you
provided, we have been able to greatly
increase the Orphe population.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0013
rows.name:
But the new red Orpheans are...strange. The
memories given to me from Kun'luarb indicate
no familiarity with such spontaneous mutations.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0014
rows.name:
It is unclear whether such mutations are beneficial
to us. But I must find the answer, so that I might
add it to my Ovah and pass it on to my own Unions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev071601_MSG0015
rows.name:
This is the puzzle that Sin'luarb and I
have a duty to solve. After all, we are
the successors of Kun'luarb's destiny![ST:wait ]
